name: Sour Cream Apple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook chicken in oil over medium heat until browned and no longer pink inside, about 6 - 8 minutes per side. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
2. Add apples, juice, onion, basil, and salt to the skillet. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer until apples are tender.
3. Combine sour cream and flour; add to skillet. Stir and cook until sauce is warm (do not boil).
4. Arrange noodles on a serving platter. Top with chicken.
5. Spoon apple sauce over all.
